assessment.note: He names a specific clarity gap around differing quality bars for quick fixes versus core flows, which is also mildly slowing his momentum.

new_queue.label: Quality bars gap
new_queue.name: Where do the quality bars feel most different to you right now?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific quality-bar gap so the manager can remove ambiguity around shipping expectations.

new_queue.label: Independence support
new_queue.name: What support from me would help you ship with less second-guessing?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the manager touchpoint that would reduce reassurance dependence over the next two weeks.

new_queue.label: Next focus
new_queue.name: Given what we covered, where do you want to focus first?
new_queue.description: Closes on a concrete next step and lets Sam choose the most useful immediate priority.
